formatted_summary:
agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Vitamin C deficiency is most strongly associated with gingival symptoms including bleeding, perifollicular hemorrhage, and inflammation due to its critical role in collagen synthesis. This effect surpasses any established connection between vitamin B deficiency and gingival disease. 

\boxed{C}

The provided information confirms that vitamin C deficiency leads to hallmark gingival changes such as bleeding and inflammatory lesions through impairment of connective tissue formation. No equivalent association has been found linking vitamin B deficiency to these specific gingival findings.  

\boxed{C}. Answer choice: C
